name: Lentil Buckwheat Loaf
recipeIngredient: dried herbs (parsley and rosemary are recommended)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the onion and carrot, and sauté in a large saucepan.
2. Add all other ingredients and bring mixture to a boil.
3. Simmer for 30 minutes until liquid is absorbed.
4. Preheat the oven to 200°C/400°F/Gas Mark 6.
5. Transfer the mixture to a loaf or flan dish.
6. Place the dish in the preheated oven.
7. Cook for 30 minutes.
